pathPolicy.outsideWorkspace: Access denied: path is outside the workspace.
pathPolicy.blockedDirectory: [BLOCKED] Direct agent access to this path is not permitted.
pathPolicy.bormagiBlocked: [BLOCKED] Agent access to .bormagi/ is not permitted. This is internal framework state.

codeNav.blockedPath: [BLOCKED] Access to this path is not permitted.
codeNav.truncated: Results truncated at {max}. Refine your pattern or increase max_results.

discoveryBudget.wholeFileExhausted: [BUDGET] Whole-file read limit reached ({limit} reads). Use read_file_range, read_head, read_tail, or read_match_context for targeted reads instead.
discoveryBudget.targetedReadExhausted: [BUDGET] Targeted read limit reached ({limit} reads). Consolidate reads or proceed to write.
discoveryBudget.globExhausted: [BUDGET] Glob/list limit reached ({limit} calls). Use grep_content to search within the files you already found.
discoveryBudget.grepExhausted: [BUDGET] Grep limit reached ({limit} calls). Proceed with the matches you have.
discoveryBudget.consecutiveExhausted: [BUDGET] {limit} consecutive discovery operations without a write or edit. Use the files you have found to make progress (write_file, edit_file, replace_range, multi_edit).
discoveryBudget.suggestion_wholeFile: Try read_file_range (read_file_range), read_head, or grep_content instead of whole-file reads.
discoveryBudget.suggestion_glob: Try grep_content to search file contents directly rather than listing directories.
discoveryBudget.suggestion_consecutive: Proceed to write or edit a file — you have done enough discovery.

editPolicy.blockedInMode: [BLOCKED] Edit tools (replace_range, multi_edit, replace_symbol_block, insert_before_symbol, insert_after_symbol) are not available in {mode} mode. Switch to code mode to make changes.
editPolicy.previewRecommended: Tip: use preview_only=true first to verify the diff before applying large edits.
editPolicy.atomicRollback: Edit transaction rolled back — all files restored. Failed edit: {reason}
editPolicy.redirectedWriteToEdit: Existing file detected at {path} — redirected write_file to edit_file

editTransaction.writeFailed: Edit failed at {path}: {error}. Rolling back all changes.
editTransaction.rollbackFailed: Rollback partially failed: {errors}. Manual inspection may be required.

symbolTools.ambiguousSymbol: Multiple symbols named '{symbol}' found. Use symbol_kind to disambiguate.
symbolTools.unsupportedFileType: Symbol tools work best with TypeScript/JavaScript files. Falling back to regex heuristics for {ext}.

searchFirstPolicy.instruction: Search before reading. Use glob_files to find files, grep_content to search contents, then read only the relevant slices with read_file_range or read_match_context. Use read_file for whole-file reads only when the file is short (< 150 lines) or targeted reads are insufficient.

indexStatus.notReady: Workspace index is not ready. Run workspace_index_status to check, or wait for the background indexer.
indexStatus.stale: Workspace index is stale. Symbol search results may be out of date.
indexStatus.buildStarted: Building workspace symbol index in the background...
